_comment: Example release manifest. Fill in real values, then sign with tools/sign_release.py. The node verifies: root signs `cert` (cert_sig) -> the certified `cert.signing_pubkey` signs the SIGNED_FIELDS below (sig) -> the downloaded binary's sha256 must match. See nexus/security/app_update.py.
cert_sig: <base64 Ed25519 signature over the cert, by the ROOT key>
sig: <base64 Ed25519 signature over the signed fields, by cert.signing_pubkey>
